label: witness
headline_statement: Conjecture 2 is confirmed: the displayed four-cell law with \(|\mathcal Z|=2\), \(|\mathcal X|=2\), \(\mathcal Y=\{0,1,2\}\), and equal cell weights has \(\Gamma(P,0)\ge 0.14\); on a sufficiently small active-set-stable neighborhood, all local feasible sets remain nonempty with strictly interior cellwise optimizers and \(\Theta_L(P,0)\) strictly contains \(\Theta_I(P,0)\).
